Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface ITacticDescriptor

All Known Subinterfaces:
ICombinedTacticDescriptor, IDynamicTacticRef, IParamTacticDescriptor, ITacticDescriptorRef
All Known Implementing Classes:
Placeholders.TacticPlaceholder, TacticDescriptorRef, TacticDescriptors.AbstractTacticDescriptor, TacticDescriptors.CombinedTacticDescriptor, TacticDescriptors.DynamicTacticRef, TacticDescriptors.ParamTacticDescriptor, TacticDescriptors.TacticDescriptor, TacticDescriptors.UninstantiableTacticDescriptor, TestingAutoTactics.TestProfile1
public interface ITacticDescriptor
An ITacticDescriptor provides a wrapper around the information contained in a tactic extension.

Each tactic extension corresponds to a tactic descriptor. The tactic descriptor for a tactic extension can be obtained using the IAutoTacticRegistry.getTacticDescriptor(String) method.

Since:
3.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getTacticDescription()
    Returns the description of the tactic extension.
    String
    getTacticID()
    Returns the id of the tactic extension.
    ITactic
    getTacticInstance()
    Returns the singleton instance of the tactic corresponding to the tactic extension.
    String
    getTacticName()
    Returns the name of the tactic extension.
    boolean
    isInstantiable()
    Returns whether this descriptor can be instantiated through a call to getTacticInstance().

  • Method Details

    • getTacticID

      String getTacticID()
      Returns the id of the tactic extension.
      Returns:
      the id of the tactic extension

    • getTacticName

      String getTacticName()
      Returns the name of the tactic extension.
      Returns:
      the name of the tactic extension

    • getTacticDescription

      String getTacticDescription()
      Returns the description of the tactic extension.

      In case no description is provided for a registered tactic, the empty string is returned.

      Returns:
      the description of the tactic extension, or the empty string if no description is provided.

    • isInstantiable

      boolean isInstantiable()
      Returns whether this descriptor can be instantiated through a call to getTacticInstance().
      Returns:
      true if instantiable, false otherwise.

    • getTacticInstance

      ITactic getTacticInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of the tactic corresponding to the tactic extension.

      Before requesting an instance, callers must ensure that this descriptor is instantiable (see isInstantiable()). Otherwise, an UnsupportedOperationException is thrown. In case there is a problem instantiating the tactic class, an IllegalStateException is thrown.

      Returns:
      an instance of the tactic
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - if this descriptor is not instantiable
      IllegalStateException - in case there is a problem instantiating the tactic
